name: Credit Glory
description_short: Credit Glory disputes errors and inaccuracies on credit reports to help consumers improve their credit scores and financial standing.
description_long:
Credit Glory is a credit repair service that helps consumers identify and challenge errors on their credit reports. The company operates through a straightforward three-step process: initial expert consultation, quick account setup, and ongoing dispute work on behalf of the client. Based in Henderson, Nevada, Credit Glory positions itself as a full-service credit repair firm that handles the paperwork and communication with creditors and credit bureaus so clients don't have to. The company emphasizes that up to 79% of credit reports contain errors, citing U.S. PIRG research, and frames credit repair as a path to financial recovery.

Credit Glory's core service is disputing inaccurate items on credit reports, including collections, charge-offs, late payments, bankruptcies, incorrect names and addresses, and balance errors. They claim to work on behalf of clients to contact bureaus and creditors, handling documentation and dispute processes. The company offers free phone consultations to assess whether their services are appropriate for a given situation and advertises that clients can cancel anytime with no long-term obligations. They position credit repair as enabling access to major financial goals: home purchases, auto loans, employment opportunities, better interest rates, and credit card approvals.

Credit Glory differentiates itself through a stated commitment to personalized assessment before taking on clients, aiming to avoid wasting time on unsuitable cases. They provide multiple contact channels and note that credit experts are available extended hours (Monday-Friday 7am-8pm EST, Saturday-Sunday 10am-6pm EST). The company claims to have "helped thousands of people" and advertises customer testimonials, though specific outcome data is not disclosed on the website.

A critical limitation is that Credit Glory makes clear disclaimers that results vary and are not guaranteed, that they cannot guarantee permanent removal of verifiable tradelines, and that individual outcomes depend on active client participation. The company also explicitly states it is not a substitute for legal advice and recommends clients contact a local attorney. These caveats suggest that credit repair outcomes are contingent on dispute processes that may have limited success rates, particularly for accurate negative items. The company's Philadelphia location URL suggests regional service, though the Nevada headquarters address and national phone numbers indicate broader service availability.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free initial phone consultation with credit expert to assess suitability before commitment
Quick account setup process requiring minimal information and a credit report from each bureau
No long-term contracts; clients can cancel anytime with no stated obligations or penalties
Extended availability with credit experts available Saturday-Sunday (10am-6pm EST) in addition to weekday hours
Handles all paperwork and dispute communications with creditors and bureaus on client's behalf
Targets multiple error types including collections, charge-offs, late payments, bankruptcies, and balance errors
Offers free consultation calls at toll-free number (844) 656-0790
cons: Company explicitly does not guarantee removal of verifiable tradelines or any particular outcome, limiting assurance of results
Requires active client participation including providing documents and investigation results, placing burden on consumer
Does not provide legal advice and is not a substitute for legal services, leaving consumers without attorney guidance
No specific pricing, success rates, or typical timelines disclosed on website; only general claim of helping 'thousands'
Cannot address legitimate negative items on credit reports, limiting usefulness for consumers with accurate negative history
best_for: Consumers with identified errors or inaccuracies on their credit reports who need professional dispute assistance
Individuals seeking to improve credit scores for major purchases like homes or vehicles without legal counsel requirements
People who want hands-off credit repair and are willing to pay for someone else to handle dispute paperwork and communications
Consumers who value flexible terms and the ability to cancel if the service doesn't meet their needs
diagnosis: Credit Glory is best for consumers who have identified errors on their credit reports and want professional help disputing them without legal involvement. The main caveat is that the company cannot guarantee results, cannot remove accurate negative items, requires active client participation, and explicitly recommends seeking legal advice—making this suitable primarily for straightforward error disputes rather than complex credit situations.
services: Free phone consultation with credit expert to assess service suitability
Disputing incorrect collections accounts on credit reports
Challenging charge-offs and balance errors with bureaus
Disputing late payment records and inaccurate payment history
Addressing bankruptcy listings when errors are present
Correcting incorrect names and addresses on credit files
Handling all paperwork and documentation for disputes
Direct communication with creditors and credit bureaus on behalf of client
Account setup and onboarding with minimal required information
Ongoing dispute and follow-up work throughout service engagement
Customer support via phone and online portal login system
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
